title: SIEYESCITY Large Powerful Rainfall Shower Head and Handheld Shower Arm - High Pressure Rain Shower Heads with Extension Arm in Chrome - Universal G1/2 Waterfall Showerhead 8 inch Square - 100 Jets
features: RAINFALL MASSAGE_ Rainfall shower heads provide a truly relaxing experience, it is designed to make your shower an enjoyable moment, offer SPA massage in the comfort of your home.
WIDE COVERAGE_ Large 8-inch waterfall shower head ensures exceptional water coverage. If you want a full-body showering experience, this is just the thing for you.

100 RAIN DROPS_ Rain setting showerhead has 100 high pressure spray nozzles that offer a strong spray, these soft silicone shower nozzles are clog-resistant, so they require very little maintenance aside from general cleaning.
POWERFUL PRESSURE_ The combination of ultra-thin design and air-in technology leads to high power and high pressure, offering consistent powerful rain shower performance.

ADJUSTABLE ANGLE_ This rainforest shower head has easy to tilt adjustable angle that allows you to enjoy the water flow from the angle you desire. Your whole body will be doused with the rain like a downpour of this shower head.
description: Product Description Rainfall shower head kits Large shower head Kits Black shower head Kits Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 138 3.8 out of 5 stars 49 4.0 out of 5 stars 138 Price £20.39 £ 20 . 39 £20.99 £ 20 . 99 £29.99 £ 29 . 99 Shower Hose ✓ ✓ ✓ Shower Holder ✓ ✓ ✓ TROUBLESHOOTING 1. THE SHOWER HEAD IS TOO HEAVY If the head tilts or drops, don’t worry — this can happen with shower heads over 400g. Just take it off the bracket, and tighten the small screw on the bracket itself. If your wall bracket isn’t very sturdy, this shower head may not be the best fit. 2. THE SHOWER HEAD LEAKS After tightening, there may still be small gaps between the pipe and fitting, which could lead to leaks. To prevent this, we recommend using a pipe sealant. Our package includes plumber’s tape and a washer to help create a tight, leak-free seal. 3. THE WATER PRESSURE IS WEAK For optimal performance, water pressure of at least 2 bar @ 12L/min is recommended. Not suitable for low pressure systems. 4. YOU ARE NOT HAPPY If you are experiencing any issues with your order, please communicate it to us immediately. Simply go to the order page, send us a message, and let our customer care team do their job and resolve the issue for you.
